languages.text: Избранни{mf|к|ца} Темных Богов был{mf||а} только рад{mf||а} даровать свое покровительство столь могущественному еретеху, предоставив в его распоряжение все тайные знания, которыми поделились с ним Четверо. Кьява Гамма, прежде служившая оплотом для служителей Бога-Машины, превратилась в наполненную механистическими ужасами твердыню, полностью подчиненную падшему манипулусу. В ее туннелях и тайных цехах множились нечестивые машины, несущие смерть врагам династии фон Валанциус.

The Dark Gods' chosen was only too glad to bestow {mf|his|her} patronage upon so powerful a heretek, placing at his disposal all the secret knowledge that had been shared with {mf|him|her} by the Four. Kiava Gamma, formerly a stronghold for the servants of the Machine God, became a bastion of mechanistic horrors that was completely loyal to the fallen Manipulus. In its tunnels and secret workshops, nefarious machines multiplied, bringing death to the enemies of the von Valancius dynasty.
languages.original_text: Избранни{mf|к|ца} Темных Богов был{mf||а} только рад{mf||а} даровать свое покровительство столь могущественному еретеху, предоставив в его распоряжение все тайные знания, которыми поделились с ним Четверо. In its tunnels and secret workshops, nefarious machines multiplied, bringing death to the enemies of the von Valancius dynasty.

Kiava Gamma, formerly a stronghold for the servants of the Machine God, became a bastion of mechanistic horrors that was completely loyal to the fallen Manipulus. languages.text: 暗黒神が選んだ者は、この強力な異端者への支援を喜んで行い、四神から授かった秘密の知識を全て彼に与えた。かつて機械神に仕える者たちの拠点であったキアヴァ・ガンマは、堕ちたマニピュラスに忠実な機械的恐怖の要塞となった。そのトンネルや秘密の工房では、悪意に満ちた機械が数多く増え、フォン・ヴァランキウス家の敵を死に至らしめた。
languages.original_text: The Dark Gods' chosen was only too glad to bestow {mf|his|her} patronage upon so powerful a heretek, placing at his disposal all the secret knowledge that had been shared with {mf|him|her} by the Four. Kiava Gamma, formerly a stronghold for the servants of the Machine God, became a bastion of mechanistic horrors that was completely loyal to the fallen Manipulus. In its tunnels and secret workshops, nefarious machines multiplied, bringing death to the enemies of the von Valancius dynasty.

traits.locale_text: 暗黒神が選んだ者は、この強力な異端者への支援を喜んで行い、四神から授かった秘密の知識を全て彼に与えた。かつて機械神に仕える者たちの拠点であったキアヴァ・ガンマは、堕ちたマニピュラスに忠実な機械的恐怖の要塞となった。そのトンネルや秘密の工房では、悪意に満ちた機械が数多く増え、フォン・ヴァランキウス家の敵を死に至らしめた。

languages.text: 黑暗诸神的神选者欣然庇护了这位强大的异端信徒，并将混沌四神分享的所有禁忌知识交予他取用。基亚瓦伽马星曾是万机之神仆人的堡垒，如今却沦为一座机械恐怖的要塞，完全效忠于这位堕落的操纵者。在它的隧道和秘密工坊中，邪恶的机器成倍增殖，为冯·瓦兰修斯王朝的敌人带去死亡。
languages.original_text: The Dark Gods' chosen was only too glad to bestow {mf|his|her} patronage upon so powerful a heretek, placing at his disposal all the secret knowledge that had been shared with {mf|him|her} by the Four. Kiava Gamma, formerly a stronghold for the servants of the Machine God, became a bastion of mechanistic horrors that was completely loyal to the fallen Manipulus. In its tunnels and secret workshops, nefarious machines multiplied, bringing death to the enemies of the von Valancius dynasty.

traits.locale_text: 黑暗诸神的神选者欣然庇护了这位强大的异端信徒，并将混沌四神分享的所有禁忌知识交予他取用。基亚瓦伽马星曾是万机之神仆人的堡垒，如今却沦为一座机械恐怖的要塞，完全效忠于这位堕落的操纵者。在它的隧道和秘密工坊中，邪恶的机器成倍增殖，为冯·瓦兰修斯王朝的敌人带去死亡。

languages.text: L'{mf|élu|élue} des Dieux Sombres ne se fit pas prier pour accorder sa protection à un hérétek aussi puissant et mit à sa disposition toutes les connaissances secrètes que les Quatre lui avaient confiées. Kiava Gamma, la forteresse des serviteurs du Dieu-Machine, devint un bastion d'horreurs mécanistes qui soutenait le manipulus déchu avec une loyauté absolue. Dans ses tunnels et ses ateliers secrets, les machines infâmes se multiplièrent et semèrent la mort parmi les ennemis de la dynastie von Valancius.
languages.original_text: The Dark Gods' chosen was only too glad to bestow {mf|his|her} patronage upon so powerful a heretek, placing at his disposal all the secret knowledge that had been shared with {mf|him|her} by the Four. Kiava Gamma, formerly a stronghold for the servants of the Machine God, became a bastion of mechanistic horrors that was completely loyal to the fallen Manipulus. In its tunnels and secret workshops, nefarious machines multiplied, bringing death to the enemies of the von Valancius dynasty.

traits.locale_text: L'{mf|élu|élue} des Dieux Sombres ne se fit pas prier pour accorder sa protection à un hérétek aussi puissant et mit à sa disposition toutes les connaissances secrètes que les Quatre lui avaient confiées. Kiava Gamma, la forteresse des serviteurs du Dieu-Machine, devint un bastion d'horreurs mécanistes qui soutenait le manipulus déchu avec une loyauté absolue. Dans ses tunnels et ses ateliers secrets, les machines infâmes se multiplièrent et semèrent la mort parmi les ennemis de la dynastie von Valancius.

languages.text: {mf|El|La} elegid{mf|o|a} de los Dioses Oscuros no dudó en patrocinar a tan poderoso heretek y puso a su disposición todo el saber secreto que los Cuatro le habían concedido. Kiava Gamma, antaño un bastión para los sirvientes del Dios Máquina, se convirtió en una fortaleza de horrores mecánicos con lealtad absoluta al manipulus caído. En sus túneles y talleres secretos, las máquinas malignas se multiplicaban para llevar la muerte a los enemigos de la dinastía von Valancius.
languages.original_text: The Dark Gods' chosen was only too glad to bestow {mf|his|her} patronage upon so powerful a heretek, placing at his disposal all the secret knowledge that had been shared with {mf|him|her} by the Four. Kiava Gamma, formerly a stronghold for the servants of the Machine God, became a bastion of mechanistic horrors that was completely loyal to the fallen Manipulus. In its tunnels and secret workshops, nefarious machines multiplied, bringing death to the enemies of the von Valancius dynasty.

traits.locale_text: {mf|El|La} elegid{mf|o|a} de los Dioses Oscuros no dudó en patrocinar a tan poderoso heretek y puso a su disposición todo el saber secreto que los Cuatro le habían concedido. Kiava Gamma, antaño un bastión para los sirvientes del Dios Máquina, se convirtió en una fortaleza de horrores mecánicos con lealtad absoluta al manipulus caído. En sus túneles y talleres secretos, las máquinas malignas se multiplicaban para llevar la muerte a los enemigos de la dinastía von Valancius.

languages.text: Kara Tanrılar'ın seçilmişi, böylesine güçlü bir tekâfire himayesini bahşetmekten fazlasıyla memnundu ve Dörtlü'nün kendisiyle paylaştığı tüm gizli bilgileri onun emrine amade etti. Bir zamanlar Makine Tanrı'nın hizmetkârlarının kalesi olan Kiava Gamma, düşmüş Manipülus'a tamamen sadık makinetik dehşetlerin kalesine dönüştü. Tünellerinde ve gizli atölyelerinde çoğalan şeytani makineler, von Valancius hanedanlığının düşmanlarına ölüm getirdi.
languages.original_text: The Dark Gods' chosen was only too glad to bestow {mf|his|her} patronage upon so powerful a heretek, placing at his disposal all the secret knowledge that had been shared with {mf|him|her} by the Four. Kiava Gamma, formerly a stronghold for the servants of the Machine God, became a bastion of mechanistic horrors that was completely loyal to the fallen Manipulus. In its tunnels and secret workshops, nefarious machines multiplied, bringing death to the enemies of the von Valancius dynasty.

traits.locale_text: Kara Tanrılar'ın seçilmişi, böylesine güçlü bir tekâfire himayesini bahşetmekten fazlasıyla memnundu ve Dörtlü'nün kendisiyle paylaştığı tüm gizli bilgileri onun emrine amade etti. Bir zamanlar Makine Tanrı'nın hizmetkârlarının kalesi olan Kiava Gamma, düşmüş Manipülus'a tamamen sadık makinetik dehşetlerin kalesine dönüştü. Tünellerinde ve gizli atölyelerinde çoğalan şeytani makineler, von Valancius hanedanlığının düşmanlarına ölüm getirdi.

languages.text: {mf|Der|Die} Auserwählte der Dunklen Götter legte {mf|seine|ihre} schützende Hand nur allzu gerne über einen so mächtigen Häretekten, durch den {mf|er|sie} all das geheime Wissen erlangte, von dem {mf|ihm|ihr} die Vier erzählt hatten. Kiava Gamma, vormals eine Festung der Diener des Maschinengottes, wurde eine Bastion mechanistischer Schrecken, die dem gefallenen Manipulus treu ergeben waren. In den Stollen und geheimen Werkstätten des Planeten brachten gottlose Maschinen Feinden der Dynastie derer von Valancius unerbittlich den Tod.
